title: samolus spathulatus
intro: Samolus spathulatus, also known as marsh samphire or seaside samphire, is a perennial plant native to the coastal areas of Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Samolus spathulatus include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming Samolus spathulatus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Samolus spathulatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
